items.caption: A digital collage featuring a woman in a white dress with her arms raised against a backdrop of a sunset over a body of water. the central part of the image shows the woman in a natural setting, while the top left corner contains text that reads "add filters on photo" in a playful font. below the central image, there are four smaller images of the same woman, each with a different filter applied, demonstrating the effect of photo editing filters. the bottom right corner has a white border framing the collage. the overall style of the image is promotional, likely for a photo editing app or service.
